productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Canvas Pink Wallet
description: Style Note Whimsical wallet for the ladies from spice art, in many pretty colour pop styles. We at myntra can't get enough of these pretty pieces. Grab a couple of styles (that are priced to make you want to buy more than one!) before stocks run out! Product Details Pink printed canvas upper One main compartment with a zippered separator and two fabric separators A slip pocket and an id holder on one side and four card holders and a slip pocket in the other Material and Care Canvas Wipe with a clean cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 19 cm x 10 cm
